rationale: The bilingual education allotment is calculated as the basic allotment multiplied by student-based factors. No reference to homestead exemptions, property tax values, or Tax Code §11.13 appears in this statute.
quote: a district is entitled to an annual allotment equal to the basic allotment multiplied by:
_note: No direct conflict. Indirect fiscal interaction through foundation school program funding is possible but not addressed in this statute's operative text.
